description_long: This is a brown paper grocery bag featuring the Burger King logo and distinctive branding. The bag is constructed from kraft paper and has two rectangular loop handles at the top for easy carrying. One side displays the Burger King logo with horizontal colored stripes in green, red, brown, and yellow, reminiscent of a hamburger. The opposite side is printed with the word 'FLAVOR' repeated in large, bold letters in brown, green, and red, along with the Burger King logo. The bag appears empty, maintaining a crisp, angular shape with visible creases and folds typical of unused paper bags. The interior is unlined and the bag is open at the top, allowing for easy access to its contents.
description: A brown paper grocery bag with Burger King branding, colored stripes, and loop handles, appearing empty and open at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Burger King logo and horizontal colored stripes, with both handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain brown side with a partial logo and colored stripes wrapping around.
description_view_2: Back view displaying repeated 'FLAVOR' text in multiple colors and the Burger King logo, with handles visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the colored stripes and the 'FLAVOR' text, as well as the open top and handles.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Burger King logo and colored stripes, 'FLAVOR' text in large letters
